timeline_description: Major political, military, and cultural milestones in the history of the Byzantine Empire.
title: Constantinople inaugurated
description: Constantine I formally dedicated Constantinople as the new imperial capital.

timeline_description: Major political, military, and cultural milestones in the history of the Byzantine Empire.
title: Death of Constantine I
description: The death of Constantine I left the empire to his sons and shaped the late Roman imperial succession.

timeline_description: Major political, military, and cultural milestones in the history of the Byzantine Empire.
title: Permanent division of the Roman Empire
description: After the death of Theodosius I, the eastern empire developed into what later became known as the Byzantine Empire.

timeline_description: Major political, military, and cultural milestones in the history of the Byzantine Empire.
title: Sack of Rome shocks the empire
description: The Visigothic sack of Rome highlighted the growing centrality of the eastern imperial court.

timeline_description: Major political, military, and cultural milestones in the history of the Byzantine Empire.
title: Fall of the Western Roman Empire
description: The end of western imperial rule left the eastern emperor as the primary Roman sovereign.

timeline_description: Major political, military, and cultural milestones in the history of the Byzantine Empire.
title: Justinian I begins reign
description: Justinian I came to the throne and launched an ambitious program of reconquest and reform.

timeline_description: Major political, military, and cultural milestones in the history of the Byzantine Empire.
title: Nika Revolt suppressed
description: Justinian crushed a major uprising in Constantinople and restored imperial authority.

timeline_description: Major political, military, and cultural milestones in the history of the Byzantine Empire.
title: Hagia Sophia completed
description: The great church of Hagia Sophia was completed under Justinian.

timeline_description: Major political, military, and cultural milestones in the history of the Byzantine Empire.
title: Death of Justinian I
description: Justinian's death ended one of the most consequential reigns in Byzantine history.

timeline_description: Major political, military, and cultural milestones in the history of the Byzantine Empire.
title: Heraclius seizes the throne
description: Heraclius came to power during a severe imperial crisis.

timeline_description: Major political, military, and cultural milestones in the history of the Byzantine Empire.
title: Avars and Persians fail to take Constantinople
description: The capital survived a major siege, preserving the empire during war with Persia.

timeline_description: Major political, military, and cultural milestones in the history of the Byzantine Empire.
title: Early Islamic expansion begins
description: The rise of Islam transformed the empire's strategic environment.

timeline_description: Major political, military, and cultural milestones in the history of the Byzantine Empire.
title: First Arab siege of Constantinople begins
description: Umayyad forces began a prolonged effort to capture the Byzantine capital.

timeline_description: Major political, military, and cultural milestones in the history of the Byzantine Empire.
title: Second Arab siege of Constantinople begins
description: The empire faced another major siege, this time by the Umayyads.

timeline_description: Major political, military, and cultural milestones in the history of the Byzantine Empire.
title: Iconoclasm begins under Leo III
description: Imperial religious policy shifted sharply with the beginning of Iconoclasm.

timeline_description: Major political, military, and cultural milestones in the history of the Byzantine Empire.
title: Charlemagne crowned emperor
description: The coronation challenged Byzantine claims to universal Roman legitimacy in the West.

timeline_description: Major political, military, and cultural milestones in the history of the Byzantine Empire.
title: Triumph of Orthodoxy restores icons
description: The restoration of icons ended the main phase of Byzantine Iconoclasm.

timeline_description: Major political, military, and cultural milestones in the history of the Byzantine Empire.
title: Basil I begins Macedonian dynasty
description: The accession of Basil I opened an era of political and cultural revival.

timeline_description: Major political, military, and cultural milestones in the history of the Byzantine Empire.
title: Baptism of Vladimir of Kyiv
description: The conversion of Kyivan Rus strengthened Byzantine religious and diplomatic influence.

timeline_description: Major political, military, and cultural milestones in the history of the Byzantine Empire.
title: Great Schism formalized
description: The breach between the churches of Rome and Constantinople deepened the division between East and West.

timeline_description: Major political, military, and cultural milestones in the history of the Byzantine Empire.
title: Battle of Manzikert
description: A major defeat to the Seljuks accelerated Byzantine losses in Anatolia.

timeline_description: Major political, military, and cultural milestones in the history of the Byzantine Empire.
title: Alexios I begins Komnenian restoration
description: Alexios I came to power and stabilized the empire after military crisis.

timeline_description: Major political, military, and cultural milestones in the history of the Byzantine Empire.
title: First Crusade launched
description: Byzantine appeals for aid helped trigger the First Crusade.

timeline_description: Major political, military, and cultural milestones in the history of the Byzantine Empire.
title: Fourth Crusade sacks Constantinople
description: Crusaders captured Constantinople and shattered Byzantine imperial unity.

timeline_description: Major political, military, and cultural milestones in the history of the Byzantine Empire.
title: Byzantines recover Constantinople
description: Michael VIII Palaiologos restored Byzantine rule in the capital.

timeline_description: Major political, military, and cultural milestones in the history of the Byzantine Empire.
title: Civil war begins
description: A destructive civil war weakened the late empire.

timeline_description: Major political, military, and cultural milestones in the history of the Byzantine Empire.
title: Ottomans seize Gallipoli
description: The Ottoman foothold in Europe intensified pressure on Byzantium.

timeline_description: Major political, military, and cultural milestones in the history of the Byzantine Empire.
title: Council of Florence attempts church union
description: Byzantine leaders sought western aid through ecclesiastical union.

timeline_description: Major political, military, and cultural milestones in the history of the Byzantine Empire.
title: Fall of Constantinople
description: Ottoman forces captured Constantinople, ending the Byzantine Empire.

timeline_title: Timeline of the World Wide Web
timeline_description: Major milestones in the invention, standardization, commercialization, and global growth of the World Wide Web.
title: Vannevar Bush imagines Memex
description: Bush described a hypertext-like information system that later influenced web thinking.

timeline_title: Timeline of the World Wide Web
timeline_description: Major milestones in the invention, standardization, commercialization, and global growth of the World Wide Web.
title: Ted Nelson coins hypertext
description: The idea of linked digital text gained a lasting name and conceptual framework.

timeline_title: Timeline of the World Wide Web
timeline_description: Major milestones in the invention, standardization, commercialization, and global growth of the World Wide Web.
title: Mother of All Demos presented
description: Douglas Engelbart demonstrated interactive computing concepts relevant to future web use.

timeline_title: Timeline of the World Wide Web
timeline_description: Major milestones in the invention, standardization, commercialization, and global growth of the World Wide Web.
title: ENQUIRE built at CERN
description: Tim Berners-Lee created ENQUIRE, an early linked-information system.

timeline_title: Timeline of the World Wide Web
timeline_description: Major milestones in the invention, standardization, commercialization, and global growth of the World Wide Web.
title: Berners-Lee returns to CERN
description: His return to CERN set the stage for the web's invention.

timeline_title: Timeline of the World Wide Web
timeline_description: Major milestones in the invention, standardization, commercialization, and global growth of the World Wide Web.
title: Berners-Lee proposes the web
description: A proposal for a distributed hypertext system outlined the basis of the World Wide Web.

timeline_title: Timeline of the World Wide Web
timeline_description: Major milestones in the invention, standardization, commercialization, and global growth of the World Wide Web.
title: Robert Cailliau joins the project
description: Cailliau helped develop and promote the web at CERN.

timeline_title: Timeline of the World Wide Web
timeline_description: Major milestones in the invention, standardization, commercialization, and global growth of the World Wide Web.
title: HTTP, HTML, and URLs take shape
description: Core standards for the web were formulated during development at CERN.

timeline_title: Timeline of the World Wide Web
timeline_description: Major milestones in the invention, standardization, commercialization, and global growth of the World Wide Web.
title: First website and browser-server system created
description: The first website and the first web software were running by the end of 1990.

timeline_title: Timeline of the World Wide Web
timeline_description: Major milestones in the invention, standardization, commercialization, and global growth of the World Wide Web.
title: Web opened to external users
description: The World Wide Web became available beyond CERN to outside institutions.

timeline_title: Timeline of the World Wide Web
timeline_description: Major milestones in the invention, standardization, commercialization, and global growth of the World Wide Web.
title: CERN places web technology in the public domain
description: CERN's decision allowed the web to spread freely and rapidly.

timeline_title: Timeline of the World Wide Web
timeline_description: Major milestones in the invention, standardization, commercialization, and global growth of the World Wide Web.
title: Mosaic browser released
description: Mosaic greatly broadened the web's public appeal and usability.

timeline_title: Timeline of the World Wide Web
timeline_description: Major milestones in the invention, standardization, commercialization, and global growth of the World Wide Web.
title: World Wide Web Consortium founded
description: The W3C was created to develop open web standards.

timeline_title: Timeline of the World Wide Web
timeline_description: Major milestones in the invention, standardization, commercialization, and global growth of the World Wide Web.
title: Netscape founded
description: Commercial browser competition accelerated web adoption.

timeline_title: Timeline of the World Wide Web
timeline_description: Major milestones in the invention, standardization, commercialization, and global growth of the World Wide Web.
title: JavaScript introduced
description: Client-side scripting changed the capabilities of web pages.

timeline_title: Timeline of the World Wide Web
timeline_description: Major milestones in the invention, standardization, commercialization, and global growth of the World Wide Web.
title: Google founded
description: Web search became a defining part of the web experience.

timeline_title: Timeline of the World Wide Web
timeline_description: Major milestones in the invention, standardization, commercialization, and global growth of the World Wide Web.
title: Wikipedia launched
description: Collaborative publishing became one of the web's most influential models.

timeline_title: Timeline of the World Wide Web
timeline_description: Major milestones in the invention, standardization, commercialization, and global growth of the World Wide Web.
title: Web 2.0 era takes hold
description: Interactive, user-generated web platforms spread rapidly.

timeline_title: Timeline of the World Wide Web
timeline_description: Major milestones in the invention, standardization, commercialization, and global growth of the World Wide Web.
title: iPhone released
description: Smartphone browsing transformed how people accessed the web.

timeline_title: Timeline of the World Wide Web
timeline_description: Major milestones in the invention, standardization, commercialization, and global growth of the World Wide Web.
title: HTML5 finalized
description: A major modern web standard was completed.

timeline_title: Timeline of the World Wide Web
timeline_description: Major milestones in the invention, standardization, commercialization, and global growth of the World Wide Web.
title: HTTPS becomes dominant on major web traffic
description: Encrypted web browsing became the normal baseline for most users.

timeline_description: Major political and military milestones in the Haitian Revolution and the creation of Haiti.
title: France gains Saint-Domingue
description: The Treaty of Ryswick confirmed French control of the western part of Hispaniola.

timeline_description: Major political and military milestones in the Haitian Revolution and the creation of Haiti.
title: Mackandal executed
description: The execution of François Mackandal became part of the colony's resistance memory.

timeline_description: Major political and military milestones in the Haitian Revolution and the creation of Haiti.
title: French Revolution begins
description: Events in France destabilized colonial politics in Saint-Domingue.

timeline_description: Major political and military milestones in the Haitian Revolution and the creation of Haiti.
title: Vincent Ogé revolt suppressed
description: Ogé's failed uprising exposed tensions over rights and race in the colony.

timeline_description: Major political and military milestones in the Haitian Revolution and the creation of Haiti.
title: Slave uprising begins in the north
description: A massive slave revolt opened the Haitian Revolution.

timeline_description: Major political and military milestones in the Haitian Revolution and the creation of Haiti.
title: France grants civil rights to free people of color
description: Revolutionary legislation reshaped political alignments in the colony.

timeline_description: Major political and military milestones in the Haitian Revolution and the creation of Haiti.
title: French commissioners proclaim emancipation locally
description: Colonial commissioners abolished slavery in Saint-Domingue before metropolitan confirmation.

timeline_description: Major political and military milestones in the Haitian Revolution and the creation of Haiti.
title: French National Convention abolishes slavery
description: France extended abolition across its colonies, transforming the conflict.

timeline_description: Major political and military milestones in the Haitian Revolution and the creation of Haiti.
title: Toussaint Louverture joins French side
description: Louverture aligned with the French Republic after emancipation.

timeline_description: Major political and military milestones in the Haitian Revolution and the creation of Haiti.
title: Spain cedes Santo Domingo to France
description: The Treaty of Basel altered the regional strategic balance.

timeline_description: Major political and military milestones in the Haitian Revolution and the creation of Haiti.
title: British evacuation completed
description: British forces withdrew after failing to defeat the revolutionary forces.

timeline_description: Major political and military milestones in the Haitian Revolution and the creation of Haiti.
title: Louverture promulgates constitution
description: Toussaint Louverture issued a constitution asserting broad autonomy for the colony.

timeline_description: Major political and military milestones in the Haitian Revolution and the creation of Haiti.
title: Leclerc expedition arrives
description: Napoleon sent a major French force to restore control.

timeline_description: Major political and military milestones in the Haitian Revolution and the creation of Haiti.
title: Toussaint Louverture captured
description: Louverture was seized and deported to France.

timeline_description: Major political and military milestones in the Haitian Revolution and the creation of Haiti.
title: Battle of Vertières
description: Revolutionary forces won the decisive battle against the French.

timeline_description: Major political and military milestones in the Haitian Revolution and the creation of Haiti.
title: Haiti declares independence
description: Jean-Jacques Dessalines proclaimed the independence of Haiti.

timeline_description: Major political and military milestones in the Haitian Revolution and the creation of Haiti.
title: Dessalines crowned emperor
description: Dessalines established the Empire of Haiti as Jacques I.

timeline_description: Major political and military milestones in the Haitian Revolution and the creation of Haiti.
title: Dessalines assassinated
description: His death led to political division within Haiti.

timeline_description: Major political and military milestones in the Haitian Revolution and the creation of Haiti.
title: Haiti divided into northern and southern states
description: Henri Christophe and Alexandre Pétion led rival regimes.

timeline_description: Major political and military milestones in the Haitian Revolution and the creation of Haiti.
title: Christophe becomes King Henry I
description: The northern state became the Kingdom of Haiti.

timeline_description: Major political and military milestones in the Haitian Revolution and the creation of Haiti.
title: Christophe dies and reunification begins
description: The northern monarchy collapsed and Haiti moved toward reunification.

timeline_description: Major political and military milestones in the Haitian Revolution and the creation of Haiti.
title: France recognizes Haiti with indemnity demands
description: Recognition came at the price of a heavy indemnity that burdened the new state.

timeline_description: Major political, military, and cultural milestones in the history of the Abbasid Caliphate.
title: Abbasid Revolution begins in Khurasan
description: The movement against Umayyad rule gathered strength under Abu Muslim.

timeline_description: Major political, military, and cultural milestones in the history of the Abbasid Caliphate.
title: Battle of the Zab
description: Abbasid forces defeated the Umayyads in the decisive battle of the revolution.

timeline_description: Major political, military, and cultural milestones in the history of the Abbasid Caliphate.
title: Abu al-Abbas al-Saffah becomes caliph
description: The first Abbasid caliph established the new dynasty.

timeline_description: Major political, military, and cultural milestones in the history of the Abbasid Caliphate.
title: Al-Mansur becomes caliph
description: Al-Mansur consolidated Abbasid power after al-Saffah's death.

timeline_description: Major political, military, and cultural milestones in the history of the Abbasid Caliphate.
title: Baghdad founded
description: Al-Mansur founded Baghdad as the Abbasid capital.

timeline_description: Major political, military, and cultural milestones in the history of the Abbasid Caliphate.
title: Harun al-Rashid begins reign
description: His reign became emblematic of Abbasid political power and court culture.

timeline_description: Major political, military, and cultural milestones in the history of the Abbasid Caliphate.
title: Aghlabids established in Ifriqiya
description: Provincial autonomy increased under Abbasid suzerainty.

timeline_description: Major political, military, and cultural milestones in the history of the Abbasid Caliphate.
title: Harun al-Rashid dies
description: A succession struggle followed the death of one of the dynasty's most famous rulers.

timeline_description: Major political, military, and cultural milestones in the history of the Abbasid Caliphate.
title: Al-Ma'mun becomes caliph
description: Civil war ended with al-Ma'mun's victory and a new phase of Abbasid rule.

timeline_description: Major political, military, and cultural milestones in the history of the Abbasid Caliphate.
title: House of Wisdom flourishes under al-Ma'mun
description: The Abbasid court became a major center of translation and scholarship.

timeline_description: Major political, military, and cultural milestones in the history of the Abbasid Caliphate.
title: Al-Mu'tasim becomes caliph
description: Military and political changes strengthened the role of Turkish troops.

timeline_description: Major political, military, and cultural milestones in the history of the Abbasid Caliphate.
title: Samarra becomes capital
description: The caliphal court moved from Baghdad to Samarra.

timeline_description: Major political, military, and cultural milestones in the history of the Abbasid Caliphate.
title: Al-Mutawakkil assassinated
description: The assassination marked the start of severe political instability at the Abbasid court.

timeline_description: Major political, military, and cultural milestones in the history of the Abbasid Caliphate.
title: Zanj Rebellion begins
description: A major revolt challenged Abbasid authority in southern Iraq.

timeline_description: Major political, military, and cultural milestones in the history of the Abbasid Caliphate.
title: Capital returns to Baghdad
description: The caliphal court moved back to Baghdad.

timeline_description: Major political, military, and cultural milestones in the history of the Abbasid Caliphate.
title: Fatimid Caliphate founded
description: A rival caliphate emerged in North Africa, challenging Abbasid prestige.

timeline_description: Major political, military, and cultural milestones in the history of the Abbasid Caliphate.
title: Buyids seize Baghdad
description: The Abbasid caliphs fell under Buyid domination.

timeline_description: Major political, military, and cultural milestones in the history of the Abbasid Caliphate.
title: Seljuks enter Baghdad
description: Sunni revival under Seljuk protection altered the political balance around the caliphate.

timeline_description: Major political, military, and cultural milestones in the history of the Abbasid Caliphate.
title: Crusaders capture Jerusalem
description: The Crusades changed the broader political environment of the Abbasid world.

timeline_description: Major political, military, and cultural milestones in the history of the Abbasid Caliphate.
title: Mongols sack Baghdad
description: The Mongol conquest ended the Abbasid Caliphate in Baghdad.

timeline_description: Major diplomatic and military milestones of the 1956 Suez Crisis.
title: Egyptian Free Officers seize power
description: The Egyptian monarchy was overthrown, reshaping the politics that led to the Suez Crisis.

timeline_description: Major diplomatic and military milestones of the 1956 Suez Crisis.
title: Anglo-Egyptian agreement on canal zone
description: Britain agreed to withdraw troops from the Suez Canal base.

timeline_description: Major diplomatic and military milestones of the 1956 Suez Crisis.
title: Egyptian-Czechoslovak arms deal
description: Egypt's arms agreement signaled a new regional alignment during the Cold War.

timeline_description: Major diplomatic and military milestones of the 1956 Suez Crisis.
title: US and Britain withdraw Aswan Dam financing
description: Western withdrawal of financing heightened tensions with Nasser.

timeline_description: Major diplomatic and military milestones of the 1956 Suez Crisis.
title: Nasser nationalizes the Suez Canal
description: Egypt nationalized the canal company, triggering the crisis.

timeline_description: Major diplomatic and military milestones of the 1956 Suez Crisis.
title: London conference on the canal convenes
description: Major powers attempted to negotiate the canal dispute.

timeline_description: Major diplomatic and military milestones of the 1956 Suez Crisis.
title: Menzies mission fails
description: Efforts to persuade Nasser to reverse nationalization failed.

timeline_description: Major diplomatic and military milestones of the 1956 Suez Crisis.
title: UN debate intensifies over the canal dispute
description: Diplomatic efforts at the United Nations failed to resolve the crisis.

timeline_description: Major diplomatic and military milestones of the 1956 Suez Crisis.
title: Protocol of Sèvres agreed
description: Israel, Britain, and France secretly coordinated a military plan against Egypt.

timeline_description: Major diplomatic and military milestones of the 1956 Suez Crisis.
title: Israel invades Sinai
description: Israeli forces began the military phase of the crisis.

timeline_description: Major diplomatic and military milestones of the 1956 Suez Crisis.
title: Britain and France issue ultimatum
description: The two powers demanded Egyptian and Israeli withdrawal from the canal zone.

timeline_description: Major diplomatic and military milestones of the 1956 Suez Crisis.
title: British and French bombing begins
description: Anglo-French air attacks on Egypt opened the intervention.

timeline_description: Major diplomatic and military milestones of the 1956 Suez Crisis.
title: UN General Assembly takes up crisis
description: The United Nations moved to address the fighting after Security Council deadlock.

timeline_description: Major diplomatic and military milestones of the 1956 Suez Crisis.
title: Anglo-French landings at Port Said
description: British and French forces landed near the canal.

timeline_description: Major diplomatic and military milestones of the 1956 Suez Crisis.
title: Cease-fire accepted
description: International pressure forced a halt to the Anglo-French-Israeli operation.

timeline_description: Major diplomatic and military milestones of the 1956 Suez Crisis.
title: First UN Emergency Force approved
description: The UN created its first large peacekeeping force to supervise the cease-fire.

timeline_description: Major diplomatic and military milestones of the 1956 Suez Crisis.
title: British and French withdrawal begins
description: Military withdrawal followed the collapse of the intervention.

timeline_description: Major diplomatic and military milestones of the 1956 Suez Crisis.
title: Israeli withdrawal completed
description: Israel withdrew from Sinai and Gaza under international pressure.

timeline_description: Major diplomatic and military milestones of the 1956 Suez Crisis.
title: Suez Canal reopens
description: The canal resumed operation after the crisis and clearance work.

timeline_description: Major diplomatic and military milestones of the 1956 Suez Crisis.
title: Nasser emerges politically strengthened
description: The crisis accelerated decolonization and elevated Nasser's prestige.

timeline_title: Timeline of the History of Genetics
timeline_description: Major milestones in the development of genetics from inheritance studies to genomic science.
title: Darwin publishes On the Origin of Species
description: Evolutionary theory intensified scientific interest in heredity.

timeline_title: Timeline of the History of Genetics
timeline_description: Major milestones in the development of genetics from inheritance studies to genomic science.
title: Mendel publishes pea plant experiments
description: Gregor Mendel set out the basic statistical laws of inheritance.

timeline_title: Timeline of the History of Genetics
timeline_description: Major milestones in the development of genetics from inheritance studies to genomic science.
title: Miescher isolates nuclein
description: Friedrich Miescher identified a substance later recognized as DNA.

timeline_title: Timeline of the History of Genetics
timeline_description: Major milestones in the development of genetics from inheritance studies to genomic science.
title: Term chromosome introduced
description: The chromosome concept became part of the study of heredity.

timeline_title: Timeline of the History of Genetics
timeline_description: Major milestones in the development of genetics from inheritance studies to genomic science.
title: Mendel's work rediscovered
description: Several scientists independently revived Mendelian inheritance.

timeline_title: Timeline of the History of Genetics
timeline_description: Major milestones in the development of genetics from inheritance studies to genomic science.
title: Sutton and Boveri advance chromosome theory
description: Inheritance was linked more directly to chromosomes.

timeline_title: Timeline of the History of Genetics
timeline_description: Major milestones in the development of genetics from inheritance studies to genomic science.
title: Bateson popularizes the term genetics
description: The new field acquired its enduring name.

timeline_title: Timeline of the History of Genetics
timeline_description: Major milestones in the development of genetics from inheritance studies to genomic science.
title: Morgan demonstrates sex-linked inheritance
description: Fruit fly experiments firmly connected genes with chromosomes.

timeline_title: Timeline of the History of Genetics
timeline_description: Major milestones in the development of genetics from inheritance studies to genomic science.
title: First genetic linkage map produced
description: Alfred Sturtevant created the first gene map.

timeline_title: Timeline of the History of Genetics
timeline_description: Major milestones in the development of genetics from inheritance studies to genomic science.
title: Griffith discovers bacterial transformation
description: Transformation hinted that heredity could be transferred chemically.

timeline_title: Timeline of the History of Genetics
timeline_description: Major milestones in the development of genetics from inheritance studies to genomic science.
title: One gene-one enzyme hypothesis proposed
description: Beadle and Tatum connected genes with biochemical function.

timeline_title: Timeline of the History of Genetics
timeline_description: Major milestones in the development of genetics from inheritance studies to genomic science.
title: Avery, MacLeod, and McCarty identify DNA as genetic material
description: Their work strongly implicated DNA in heredity.

timeline_title: Timeline of the History of Genetics
timeline_description: Major milestones in the development of genetics from inheritance studies to genomic science.
title: Hershey-Chase experiment confirms DNA role
description: Bacteriophage experiments reinforced DNA's central role in heredity.

timeline_title: Timeline of the History of Genetics
timeline_description: Major milestones in the development of genetics from inheritance studies to genomic science.
title: DNA double helix described
description: Watson and Crick proposed the double-helix structure of DNA.

timeline_title: Timeline of the History of Genetics
timeline_description: Major milestones in the development of genetics from inheritance studies to genomic science.
title: Genetic code begins to be deciphered
description: Key experiments advanced understanding of how nucleotide sequences encode proteins.

timeline_title: Timeline of the History of Genetics
timeline_description: Major milestones in the development of genetics from inheritance studies to genomic science.
title: Recombinant DNA methods developed
description: Modern genetic engineering began with recombinant DNA techniques.

timeline_title: Timeline of the History of Genetics
timeline_description: Major milestones in the development of genetics from inheritance studies to genomic science.
title: DNA sequencing methods introduced
description: Rapid sequencing transformed molecular genetics.

timeline_title: Timeline of the History of Genetics
timeline_description: Major milestones in the development of genetics from inheritance studies to genomic science.
title: PCR invented
description: Polymerase chain reaction made DNA amplification routine.

timeline_title: Timeline of the History of Genetics
timeline_description: Major milestones in the development of genetics from inheritance studies to genomic science.
title: Human Genome Project launched
description: A major international effort began to map and sequence the human genome.

timeline_title: Timeline of the History of Genetics
timeline_description: Major milestones in the development of genetics from inheritance studies to genomic science.
title: Human Genome Project completed
description: A landmark reference sequence of the human genome was announced.

timeline_title: Timeline of the History of Genetics
timeline_description: Major milestones in the development of genetics from inheritance studies to genomic science.
title: CRISPR gene editing transformed genetics
description: CRISPR-Cas9 emerged as a powerful gene-editing tool.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Battle of Stalingrad
timeline_description: Major military milestones of the Battle of Stalingrad during the Second World War.
title: Germany invades the Soviet Union
description: Operation Barbarossa created the broader eastern front that led to Stalingrad.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Battle of Stalingrad
timeline_description: Major military milestones of the Battle of Stalingrad during the Second World War.
title: Hitler issues Directive No. 41
description: The German summer offensive was planned with the Caucasus and Volga in mind.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Battle of Stalingrad
timeline_description: Major military milestones of the Battle of Stalingrad during the Second World War.
title: Operation Blue begins
description: German forces launched their 1942 summer offensive in southern Russia.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Battle of Stalingrad
timeline_description: Major military milestones of the Battle of Stalingrad during the Second World War.
title: Battle of Stalingrad begins
description: Fighting opened on the approaches to Stalingrad.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Battle of Stalingrad
timeline_description: Major military milestones of the Battle of Stalingrad during the Second World War.
title: Order No. 227 issued
description: Stalin's No Step Back order hardened Soviet resistance.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Battle of Stalingrad
timeline_description: Major military milestones of the Battle of Stalingrad during the Second World War.
title: Luftwaffe devastates Stalingrad
description: A massive air attack turned much of the city into ruins.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Battle of Stalingrad
timeline_description: Major military milestones of the Battle of Stalingrad during the Second World War.
title: German assault enters the city
description: Urban combat intensified inside Stalingrad.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Battle of Stalingrad
timeline_description: Major military milestones of the Battle of Stalingrad during the Second World War.
title: Fighting for central Stalingrad intensifies
description: Combat around key positions became ferocious house-to-house warfare.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Battle of Stalingrad
timeline_description: Major military milestones of the Battle of Stalingrad during the Second World War.
title: Mamayev Kurgan contested
description: The hill became one of the battle's most fiercely fought positions.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Battle of Stalingrad
timeline_description: Major military milestones of the Battle of Stalingrad during the Second World War.
title: Red October factory battle begins
description: Industrial districts became major centers of resistance.

timeline_title: Timeline of the Battle of Stalingrad
timeline_description: Major military milestones of the Battle of Stalingrad during the Second World War.
title: Barrikady factory fighting peaks
